title: cordyline stricta var. congesta
intro: Cordyline stricta var. congesta, also known as the 'Red Fountain' or 'Red Star', is a variety of the Cordyline stricta plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting overall well-being. Cordyline stricta var. congesta is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
